## Expected Behavior
<!-- How should the feature work? -->

<!-- Optional: your ideas on how to implement this -->

[example code or workflow]

- Benefit 3

## Potential Challenges
<!-- Any potential issues or challenges? -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Are there alternative solutions? -->

## References
<!-- Any related issues, PRs, or external documentation? -->

## Priority
- [ ] Critical (blocks other work)
- [ ] High (important feature)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic/optional)

## Scope
- [ ] Backend API change
- [ ] Frontend UI change
- [ ] Plugin system enhancement
- [ ] Docker/deployment change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Testing framework
- [ ] Other
